skills_at_a_glance.area: Create apps by using Microsoft Power Apps
Create and manage logic and process automation

Manage the data model: Create or modify standard, activity, or virtual tables
Create new tables or modify existing tables
Determine which type of relationship to implement, including one-to-many and many-to-many
Configure table relationships including behaviors and cascading rules
Create new or modify existing columns, including rollup and formula
Manage Dataverse: Configure Dataverse search, and manage the search index
Describe options for importing and exporting data
Configure security settings: Create and manage users and teams
Configure Microsoft Entra ID group teams

Create model-driven apps: Create and configure multiple form types
Use controls in the form designer
Configure modern commanding by using Power Fx
Embed a canvas app in a model-driven app form
Add Microsoft Power BI dashboards and reports in a model-driven app
Describe canvas apps: Describe form navigation, formulas, variables and collections, and error handling
Describe how Microsoft Power Automate flows are called from a canvas app
Build Microsoft Power Pages: Configure pages, forms, lists, and navigation
Describe advanced Power Pages features, including document management, search, multi-step forms, and Power BI
Configure website security including web roles and page access

Create and manage cloud flows: Describe types of flows, use cases, and flow components, including when to use a classic workflow
Implement logic controls including branches, loops, conditions, error handling, and variables
Create and manage business process flows: Add stages, workflows, and flow steps to a business process flow
Manage the business process flow table for a business process flow
Implement low-code logic: Create and manage Power Fx functions and formulas

Participate in application lifecycle man: Describe use cases for app checker and solution checker
Describe the difference between managed and unmanaged Dataverse solutions
Manage Microsoft Power Platform environments for development
